forecasts.reasoning: Based on systematic research, the probability is low that Ouattara will declare his candidacy before June 1, 2025. Historical patterns show he typically announces 2-3 months before election day (July-August for October elections). At 6 months out from the October 25, 2025 election, we're significantly earlier than his past announcement timelines. Additionally, he's been consistently 'undecided' since January 2025 with no new developments in April. International pressure against his candidacy is increasing, his party's pressure notwithstanding. With only 1 month until June 1 and no momentum building, the timing doesn't align with his established pattern of waiting until July-September to make official declarations.
